creator: marko.cupac@mimar.rs
text:
Building of emulators/virtualbox-ose fails with the following message:

..
kBuild: Installing /usr/ports/emulators/virtualbox-ose/work/VirtualBox-4.2.20/out/freebsd.amd64/release/bin/sdk/bindings/VirtualBox.xidl
kBuild: Installing /usr/ports/emulators/virtualbox-ose/work/VirtualBox-4.2.20/out/freebsd.amd64/release/bin/sdk/installer/vboxapi/__init__.py
install: warning: Not hard linking, mode differs: 0755, desires 0644
install: src path '/usr/ports/emulators/virtualbox-ose/work/VirtualBox-4.2.20/src/VBox/Main/glue/vboxapi.py'
install: dst path '/usr/ports/emulators/virtualbox-ose/work/VirtualBox-4.2.20/out/freebsd.amd64/release/bin/sdk/installer/vboxapi/__init__.py'
kBuild: xsltproc Python constants - /usr/ports/emulators/virtualbox-ose/work/VirtualBox-4.2.20/src/VBox/Main/glue/constants-python.xsl
kBuild: Installing /usr/ports/emulators/virtualbox-ose/work/VirtualBox-4.2.20/out/freebsd.amd64/release/bin/sdk/installer/vboxapi/VirtualBox_constants.py
kBuild: Installing /usr/ports/emulators/virtualbox-ose/work/VirtualBox-4.2.20/out/freebsd.amd64/release/bin/sdk/bindings/glue/java/TestVBox.java
kBuild: Installing /usr/ports/emulators/virtualbox-ose/work/VirtualBox-4.2.20/out/freebsd.amd64/release/bin/sdk/bindings/glue/java/Makefile
kmk: *** No rule to make target `/usr/src/sys/kern/bus_if.m', needed by `/usr/ports/emulators/virtualbox-ose/work/VirtualBox-4.2.20/out/freebsd.amd64/release/obj/FreeBSDGeneratedKernelHeaders/bus_if.h'.  Stop.
*** Error code 2

Stop.
make[1]: stopped in /usr/ports/emulators/virtualbox-ose
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/emulators/virtualbox-ose

===>>> make failed for emulators/virtualbox-ose

How-To-Repeat: Try to build emulators/virtualbox-ose on 10-stable
